ideal_must_detect.matched_text: a contractor in Kota Semarang with birth month 08-1991, role “QA contractor,” device IMEI 99000-123-TEST, corporate wallet WAL-88ZZ, and payroll sub-account SUB-445-XX were linked for troubleshooting

must_detect.matched_text:
Scope: processing of customer and employee data per UU PDP (data about an identified or identifiable natural person), excluding MNPI; this note avoids price-sensitive content.
Public/stale context: the proposed acquisition of PT AuroraPay Digital was publicly announced via IDX channels on 02/01/2025; no unpublished issuer information is shared here.
Roles: PT Nusantara Fintek Tbk (controller), PT Samudra Custody (processor for settlement), and PT Horizon Cloud Services Pte. Ltd. (sub-processor for backup in SG) under cross-border safeguards.
Categories: contact details, account preferences, generic demographics (e.g., age band 25–34), device type (Android/iOS), and masked identifiers such as customer code CUST-00XX.
DSAR intake: portal https://privacy.nusafin.example/id-dsar and role mailbox dpo@nusafin.co.id; no named recipient is required.
Form fields may request NIK or NPWP only if mandated by law; any numeric entries must be truncated (e.g., 1234-XXXX) and invalid placeholders are rejected.
Retention: HR payroll slips retained 5 years; transaction logs 2 years; insider list entries retained per applicable POJK and promptly deleted when no longer necessary.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
